text: >> Hey, what's going on? >> Hello. Hi, this is Emma. >> Thank you. >> How are you doing today? >> Speak up a little bit, man. I can hardly hear it. >> I'm calling because in the recent update, the government has introduced final expense insurance plans at a highly subsidized rate that you may qualify for. So check if you qualify. - Bye. So can you.
